testcase.name: test_05_result_full_schema

failure.message: AssertionError: pmf missing problem_severity_score assert 'problem_severity_score' in {'pmf_score': 45, 'demand_score': 50, 'market_readiness_score': 30, 'differentiation_score': 40, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test_v3.py:106: in test_05_result_full_schema assert k in pmf, f"pmf missing {k}" E AssertionError: pmf missing problem_severity_score E assert 'problem_severity_score' in {'pmf_score': 45, 'demand_score': 50, 'market_readiness_score': 30, 'differentiation_score': 40, ...}

testcase.name: test_11_battle_criteria_array
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test_v3.py:185: in test_11_battle_criteria_array assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","project_a_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"idea_a":"AI-powered code review SaaS for enterprise dev teams","idea_b":"Drone-based crop monitoring for smallholder farmers"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","project_b_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"idea_a":"AI-powered code review SaaS for enterprise dev teams","idea_b":"Drone-based crop monitoring for smallholder farmers"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_13_leaderboard

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'project_id': 'proj_b43272d12fd6', 'public_link_id': '6a786defeb', 'name': 'AsyncTest TEST', 'category': 'SaaS', ...}], 'sort': 'validation'}, list) + where {'items': [{'project_id': 'proj_b43272d12fd6', 'public_link_id': '6a786defeb', 'name': 'AsyncTest TEST', 'category': 'SaaS', ...}], 'sort': 'validation'} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test_v3.py:214: in test_13_leaderboard assert isinstance(r.json(), list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'project_id': 'proj_b43272d12fd6', 'public_link_id': '6a786defeb', 'name': 'AsyncTest TEST', 'category': 'SaaS', ...}], 'sort': 'validation'}, list) E + where {'items': [{'project_id': 'proj_b43272d12fd6', 'public_link_id': '6a786defeb', 'name': 'AsyncTest TEST', 'category': 'SaaS', ...}], 'sort': 'validation'} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
